chapter_title.en: Chapter 66 – The fairness and the justice

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/349)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/349)
text: اتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَ اعْدِلُوا فَإِنَّكُمْ تَعِيبُونَ عَلَى قَوْمٍ لَا يَعْدِلُونَ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ghalib Bin Usman, from Rawh Ibn Ukht Al Moalla,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> having said: ‘Fear Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and do justice, for you would be finding faults upon a people who are not doing justice’.
en.sarwar: 14. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from ibn Faddal from Ghalib ibn ‘Uthman from Ruh ibn ‘Ukht (nephew) of Mu’alla from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Be pious before Allah and practice justice; you blame other people for not doing justice to others.”
